advancements.ekotsk.root.title: §6A Song of Ice and Fire
advancements.ekotsk.root.description: Welcome to §lEpic Knights of the Seven Kingdoms§r§a addon!
advancements.ekotsk.blackfyre.title: The King Who Bears the Sword
advancements.ekotsk.blackfyre.descriptio: §fAcquire §nBlackfyre§r§f - a fabled hand-and-a-half longsword of Valyrian steel, heirloom of §lHouse Targaryen§r§f and §lHouse Blackfyre§r§f.
advancements.ekotsk.ice.title: The North Remembers
advancements.ekotsk.ice.description: §fAcquire §nIce§r§f - an ancestral greatsword of Valyrian steel, which belonged to §lHouse Stark§r§f since ancient times.
advancements.ekotsk.aegon_dagger.title: The Prophecy
advancements.ekotsk.aegon_dagger.descrip: §fAcquire §nAegon the Conqueror's Dagger§r§f - an ancient dagger of Valyrian steel, which reportedly is passed from king to his heir of §lHouse Targaryen§r§f.
advancements.ekotsk.aegon.title: The True King
advancements.ekotsk.aegon.description: §fAcquire the §nConqueror's Crown§r§f - a crown forged from Valyrian steel for §lAegon the Conqueror§r§f, a relic of a true king.
advancements.ekotsk.brightroar.title: Doomed by ambitions
advancements.ekotsk.brightroar.descripti: §fAcquire §nBrightroar§r§f - an ancient longsword of Valyrian steel, which belonged to §lTommen II Lannister§r§f, who carried it in his journey to ruined Valyria. He never came back.
advancements.ekotsk.longclaw.title: A fitting sword
advancements.ekotsk.longclaw.description: §fAcquire §nLongclaw§r§f - a half-a-hand, or 'bastard' sword of Valyrian steel, which belonged to §lHouse Mormont§r§f but was given to bastard §lJon Snow§r§f by §lJeor Mormont§r§f.
advancements.ekotsk.dawn.title: The Sword of the Morning
advancements.ekotsk.dawn.description: §fAcquire §nDawn§r§f - an ancestral greatsword of §lHouse Dayne§r§f who bestow the title 'Sword of the Morning' on the sword's bearer. It is made from meteorite steel.
advancements.ekotsk.dark_sister.title: The Dragon Knight
advancements.ekotsk.dark_sister.descript: §fAcquire §nDark Sister§r§f - an ancestral longsword of Valyrian steel, which belonged to §lHouse Targaryen§r§f's renown warriors like §lDaemon Targaryen§r§f, the §lRogue Prince§r§f, and §lBrynden Rivers§r§f, the §lBloodraven§r§f.
advancements.ekotsk.crab_pincer.title: The Crabber
advancements.ekotsk.crab_pincer.descript: §fAcquire §nCrab's Pincer§r§f - an axe of Valyrian steel, which belonged to §lHouse Celtigar§r§f since ancient times. Or they say so.
advancements.ekotsk.lady_forlorn.title: The Thirsty Lady
advancements.ekotsk.lady_forlorn.descrip: §fAcquire §nLady Forlorn§r§f - an ancient longsword of Valyrian steel, which belonged to §lHouse Corbray§r§f of the §lVale§r§f. §o'My lady has a thirst. Whenever she comes out to dance, she likes a drop of red.'§r§f
advancements.ekotsk.red_rain.title: The Cunning
advancements.ekotsk.red_rain.description: §fAcquire §nRed Rain§r§f - an ancestral sword of Valyrian steel, which belonged to §lHouse Drumm§r§f since §lHilmar Drumm§r§f took the blade from a knight of §lHouse Reyne§r§f, using nothing but his wits... and a wooden crudgel.
advancements.ekotsk.truth.title: The Lysene Warrior
advancements.ekotsk.truth.description: §fAcquire §nTruth§r§f - a longsword of Valyrian steel, which belonged to §lRogare Family§r§f from §lLys§r§f, well-known by their wealth.
advancements.ekotsk.lamentation.title: The Seven Who Rode
advancements.ekotsk.lamentation.descript: §fAcquire §nLamentation§r§f - a famed sword of Valyrian steel, which belonged to §lHouse Royce§r§f. Ser §lWilliam Royce§r§f wielded the blade, being one of the §lSeven Who Rode§r§f to rescue Prince §lJoffrey Velaryon§r§f during the riot of §lKing's Landing§r§f.
advancements.ekotsk.vigilance.title: The Beacon of South
advancements.ekotsk.vigilance.descriptio: §fAcquire §nVigilance§r§f - an ancestral longsword of Valyrian steel, belonging to §lHouse Hightower§r§f. §lOrmund Hightower§r§f used it to knight Prince §lDaeron Targaryen§r§f, granting him title 'The Daring', after the §lBattle on the Honeywine§r§f.
advancements.ekotsk.robert_hammer.title: GODS, I WAS STRONG THEN
advancements.ekotsk.robert_hammer.descri: §fAcquire §nRobert Baratheon's Warhammer§r§f - a heavy warhammer which he used to cave into §nRhaegar Targaryen§r§f's chestplate in the §nBattle of Trident§r§f.
advancements.ekotsk.sandoq.title: The Shadow
advancements.ekotsk.sandoq.description: §fAcquire the famous blade of §nSandoq the Shadow§r§f - a great curved sword of Valyrian steel with the hilt made of dragonbone, which Sandoq used to protect §lPrince Viserys§r§f and §lKing Aegon III§r§f during §lLysene Spring§r§f.
advancements.ekotsk.heartsbane.title: The Lord of the Horn Hill
advancements.ekotsk.heartsbane.descripti: §fAcquire §nHeartsbane§r§f - an ancestral greatsword of Valyrian steel, which belonged to §lHouse Tarly§r§f since ancient times.
advancements.ekotsk.nightfall.title: The Raider's Treasure
advancements.ekotsk.nightfall.descriptio: §fAcquire §nNightfall§r§f - a longsword of Valyrian steel, which belonged to §lDalton Greyjoy§r§f and somehow ended up being the heirloom of §lHouse Harlaw§r§f.
